data.text:
No source changes were needed in this worktree. The bead contract is already satisfied by the existing implementation and tests:

- `sortBeadsForQueue` now orders by priority, then parsed `queue-rank`, then created-at, then ID in [cli/internal/bead/store.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-5ca2b0af-20260506T155809-36719f72/cli/internal/bead/store.go#L1702).
- `parseQueueRank` accepts numeric values and numeric strings in [cli/internal/bead/store.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-5ca2b0af-20260506T155809-36719f72/cli/internal/bead/store.go#L1722).
- The required queue-rank tests are already present in [cli/internal/bead/gaps_test.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-5ca2b0af-20260506T155809-36719f72/cli/internal/bead/gaps_test.go#L58) and [cli/internal/bead/gaps_test.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-5ca2b0af-20260506T155809-36719f72/cli/internal/bead/gaps_test.go#L101).

Verification passed:

- `cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... -run 'TestReady.*QueueRank|TestQueueRank' -count=1`
- `cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/...`
- `lefthook run pre-commit`

I wrote the execution evidence to [.ddx/executions/20260506T155809-36719f72/no_changes_rationale.txt](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-5ca2b0af-20260506T155809-36719f72/.ddx/executions/20260506T155809-36719f72/no_changes_rationale.txt).
